title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.317 - Bylaws, adoption and approval
text:
238.317.  Bylaws, adoption and approval. — The board shall adopt corporation bylaws which shall be approved by a minute of the commission.  The bylaws of a corporation shall not be amended without approval by a minute of the commission.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 17) 
Effective 5-30-90
